hook.summary: A simple level is quickly solved to demonstrate the core sorting mechanic.
hook.visual_action: Orange characters are moved into a matching orange box on a grid to complete Level 17.

scene_flow: Level 17 begins with a simple layout and a few orange characters.
The characters are successfully moved into the target box, completing the level.
Level 18 transitions in, presenting a significantly more complex grid with multiple colors.
Gameplay continues with rapid sorting of various colored characters into their respective boxes.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle gamers who enjoy organized, color-matching sorting challenges.
